positive: A whimsical and stylized depiction of a forest scene at twilight. The composition should feature silhouetted, oversized flora—giant bioluminescent mushrooms, stylized ferns, and creeping vines—forming a natural, intricate frame around a small, gentle stream. The lighting is dramatic, utilizing deep sapphire blues, electric emerald greens, and warm golden accents from the mushrooms, creating a glowing contrast. The overall style is modern vector illustration mixed with detailed watercolor textures, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Clean, strong silhouettes, symmetrical composition, high contrast, maximalist nature design.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, low detail, poor anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, noise, grain, logos, trademarks, anime, photorealistic, messy, cluttered
